features.title: Admin dashboard
features.summary: Compact CMS dashboard with project status, quick actions and recent activity.

features.title: Page block editor
features.summary: Build pages by composing your own Astro components as reusable content blocks.

features.title: Typed block schema contract
features.summary: Define block schemas in TypeScript with explicit fields and runtime-safe registration.

features.title: Draft and publish workflow
features.summary: Manage page lifecycle with draft, published and archived states.

features.title: SEO controls
features.summary: Control title, description, canonical, image and indexability per page.

features.title: Visual menus builder
features.summary: Create nested site menus with selector-based access from frontend layouts.

features.title: Redirect rules manager
features.summary: Manage 301 and 302 redirects directly from the admin panel.

features.title: Config parameters manager and helper
features.summary: Manage global key/value parameters in the admin and consume them at runtime with getConfig.

features.title: Media uploads
features.summary: Upload and reference media files stored in public/uploads.

features.title: Users and authentication
features.summary: Session-based CMS authentication with owner and user roles.

features.title: Content languages
features.summary: Configure enabled languages and default locale for localized content.

features.title: i18n runtime helpers
features.summary: Use getLanguages and getI18nMeta helpers to build locale-aware site UIs.

features.title: Menu runtime helper
features.summary: Read menu entries from templates using getMenu with locale support.

features.title: Robots and sitemap generation
features.summary: Generate robots.txt and sitemap-index.xml from CMS-managed content.

features.title: Astro cache invalidation
features.summary: Invalidate Astro experimental cache from content updates and manual panel actions.

features.title: Server or static public rendering
features.summary: Choose server rendering by default or switch to static rendering mode.

features.title: Schema-driven global blocks
features.summary: Reusable, schema-bound, locale-aware single-instance blocks with a shared admin editor and a runtime component.
